name: Arzum Elektrikli Ev Aletleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Arzum Elektrikli Ev Aletleri San. ve Tic. AS engages in the manufacture and supply of household appliances for households worldwide. It offers food preparation, cooking, frying, beverage preparation, cleaning, personal care, iron, baby products, day gifts, and accessories. The company sells its products through authorized retail points. Arzum Elektrikli Ev Aletleri San. ve Tic. AS was formerly known as Guney Ithalat Kollektif Sirketi. The company was founded in 1953 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey with additional offices in Hong Kong and Turkey.
